3045210.name: Offloom
3045210.description:
About This Application

Offloom is a free AI assistant that runs on your PC.
It installs with one click on Steam and ships with curated models that are included and tested.
No setup. No model hunting.

Highlights

• Free base app, always
• One click install
• Runs locally on your hardware
• Optional web search when you want up to date info
• Clickable citations so you can verify sources

Features

Chat

• Natural conversation for writing, planning, brainstorming, and research

Workspaces

• Keep conversations organized by project
• Separate topics and come back later without losing track

PDF Q and A with clickable citations

• Upload a PDF and ask questions about it
• Click citations to jump to the exact text used to answer

Local image generation

• Generate images from prompts using your hardware

Optional web search

• Turn web search on when you need current information
• Turn it off any time for a fully offline experience

Voice and response toggles

• Listen to responses with text to speech
• Choose from multiple voice options
• Use simple toggles to control features like thinking, document use, web search, and speech

Hardware and performance notes

Offloom runs locally, so performance depends on your system.

Recommended

• A GPU with 12GB or more VRAM is recommended for the intended experience across the app

What to expect on lower end hardware

• Systems with less than 12GB VRAM may run significantly slower
• Some workloads may fall back to CPU which can be frustrating for real time use

Accuracy and responsible use

Offloom uses local AI models, which may be smaller and less accurate than some paid online services. AI can make mistakes. Use responsibly, especially for medical, legal, or financial decisions.

When sources are provided, review them if accuracy matters.

Privacy notes

• Workspaces and uploaded documents are stored locally on your device
• Web search is optional and can be turned off at any time
• When web search is enabled, Offloom connects to the internet to retrieve results like normal browsing
• Network activity may be visible to third parties such as your ISP, network administrator, or the services you access

Free forever

The base application and the core features described on this page will always remain free.
